title: Lingua Mundi
description: Learn the Language of the World, build modular spells, enjoy fantastic visuals.
body:
[![Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/FORGE-1.20.1-f3f0e8?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=555555)](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/)[![NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/NEOFORGE-1.21.1-e8a93f?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=555555)](https://neoforged.net/)[![Dependency](https://img.shields.io/badge/DEPENDENCY-PATCHOULI-6a9c45?style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/DISCORD-JOIN%20SERVER-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/2XG5m2FqUH)
![Lingua Mundi Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6253787009045589b5b2b1d320888b76406dc5f.jpeg)
Lingua Mundi is a mod that enables player to create their own spells, defining behaviour by arranging glyphs and leveraging a stack-based approach inspired by Hexcasting. Gameplay is centred around unlocking spell glyphs, building custom spells and customising casting items to fine-tune bonuses, stats and appearance.

## Design Philosophy:
Lingua Mundi aims to make players feel like they really are mages, investigating researching and using their knowledge and imagination to build any spells they need. Beyond providing tools to define and shape spells, carefully crafted visuals aim to immerse players and give them a real sense of awe that we believe magic ought to have.
- Near-complete freedom-- Turing-complete stack-based spellcasting!
- Beautiful aesthetics-- Each spell and asset is carefully crafted to be visually pleasing.
- Customizeable casting items-- Customize you casting items' stats and appearance.
- Balanced & survival-friendly-- Designed for multiplayer, accessible in survival.

## Features:
- Custom, programmable spellcasting with over 60 spell effects!
- Over 150 computational glyphs that define behaviour!
- Over 700 variants of staff, built from different gems, rods and caps!
- 21 gem upgrades for players to truly fine-tune stats!
- Uncover and unlock new spells hidden throughout the world!

## Getting Started:
Read the Textbook, it contains everything you need to know; you should spawn with it! Follow the steps of a student of a bygone age, and learn the Language of the World.

Above all, have fun, be creative, play with your friends!

[![Join the community!](https://img.shields.io/badge/JOIN%20THE%20COMMUNITY!-LINGUA%20MUNDI%20SERVER-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&labelColor=404EED)](https://discord.gg/2XG5m2FqUH)
